info.title: appwrite-migrator
info.description: A CLI tool to help sync and migrate your DB schema with AppWrite.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Syncs the settings from your provided project to a local json file.

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Migrates the local settings json up to the specified project.

options.name: --id
options.description: the Project ID for the target project (Required)

options.name: --key
options.description: The API Key for the project (Required)

options.name: --file-name
options.description: The filename containing the schema definition (Default: appwrite-schema.json)

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Syncs the settings from your provided project to a local json file.

options.name: --id
options.description: the Project ID for the target project (Required)

options.name: --key
options.description: The API Key for the project (Required)

options.name: --file-name
options.description: The filename to store the schema within (Default: appwrite-schema.json)
